Kenny Schachter.bio: Art world insider, writer, collector, and NFT crusader who has been creating, curating, and teaching art for over 30 years. Co-author of The NFT Book and a prolific voice bridging traditional art and web3.

Jon Burgerman.bio: UK-born, NYC-based artist famed as the leading figure in the popular doodle art style. His instantly recognizable characters and murals have led to collaborations with Nike, Pepsi, Sony, and MTV.

Bard Ionson.bio: AI art pioneer and creative technologist who entered the NFT space in 2018 on SuperRare. His strange visions combine tools like GANs, VCRs, oscilloscopes, and blockchains to capture the spaces between physical and digital worlds.

Ryan Seslow.bio: NYC-based visual artist and associate professor of digital art who works across drawing, painting, new media, and internet art. An early crypto art adopter with works on SuperRare.

David Horvath & Sun-Min.bio: Creators of the beloved Uglydoll characters and the Uglyverse, a world celebrating uniqueness and imperfection. Their toy line won the Specialty Toy of the Year award and sold over a million dolls.

Matthew Stone.bio: London-born artist known for painting brushstrokes on glass, then reconstructing them in 3D software to create luminous digital figures. His Energy Portals series bridges physical paint and NFTs across galleries and the metaverse.

Jade \"MUMBOT\".bio: NY/BKK-based artist, toy designer, and storyteller behind MUMBOT WORLD, a magical universe of original characters. Founded Ghost Club, an international creative community, and pioneered bundling NFTs with physical collectibles.

Ross Symons.bio: South African origami artist who quit his dev job in 2014 to fold paper full-time. His Instagram @white_onrice grew to over 100K followers, leading to commissions from Dior, Red Bull, Samsung, and Pixar.

Rebecca Rose.bio: Award-winning sculptor, NFT hologram artist, and crypto art curator. Her work lives in the permanent collection of MoCA (Museum of Crypto Art) as its first official NFT hologram, and she has curated over 25 NFT exhibitions.

Amir Fallah.bio: Iranian-American painter, publisher, and installation artist whose richly ornamental works combine Persian miniature painting traditions with Western pop culture. Recipient of the Joan Mitchell Foundation grant.

O'Plerou.bio: Ivorian graphic designer and illustrator who created over 365 African emojis for the Zouzoukwa app, bringing West African culture to smartphone keyboards. Named to the Forbes Africa 30 Under 30 list.

dada.art.bio: Pioneering collaborative art platform where people worldwide create visual conversations through drawing. Home to over 120,000 drawings and creators of Creeps & Weirdos (2017), one of the first NFT projects with automated royalties.

Florian Tappeser / digitalflower.bio: Movie industry veteran and award-winning animator who worked on Hotel Transylvania 3 and How to Train Your Dragon. Creator of the Drippieverse, a web3 universe of vibey creatures.

Jeremiah Allen Welch.bio: San Francisco-based artist and designer behind creative studio Massiflux, creating custom art installations and stage props for clients like Airbnb, Adobe, and Mariah Carey. His art even orbits Earth on Planet Labs satellites.

Chinwe Onwudiwe.bio: Digital artist and creator of the first African Museum in the Metaverse, making cultural and artistic experiences accessible to global audiences through web3 technology.

Nate Bear.bio: New Jersey-based artist and animator known as BEARBRAINS, experimenting with dynamic cartoon aesthetics and digital animation. A member of Ghost Club who ran one of the first all-NFT Comic Con booths.

Toy Boogers.bio: Creator of 3,333 unique, 100% hand-drawn NFTs -- no algorithms, each one a true original. Signed a partnership with TIME Studios to develop an animated series based on the Toy Boogers universe.

Jen Stein.bio: Sculptor, educator, and decentralization advocate known for her bold sculptural work. Personally onboarded over 100 people into NFTs and crypto, championing creators shut out of traditional platforms.

obxium.bio: Experimental crypto artist and self-described blonkchainologist, pushing the boundaries of what NFT art can be through unconventional creative coding and blockchain experimentation.

Plotski.bio: Digital artist from South Carolina, Senior Director of Operations at NotFungible, and NFT instructor at Otis College. Co-Founder of Adaptive Labs and active member of the Superchief NFT community.

Joel Fallerini.bio: Contributing artist to the Rare Pizzas collection with multiple toppings spanning Crust, Sauce, and more. Known for imaginative designs from Moon Crust to Deep Space.

Jim.bio: Developer and creative known as jimthedev, contributing the foundational Tomato Sauce to the Rare Pizzas collection.

Didi Mx.bio: Bulgarian-born abstract artist exploring relationships between colors, shapes, light, and landscape. Active across NFT platforms including Foundation and OpenSea.

Erick Stow.bio: Contributing artist to the Rare Pizzas collection, responsible for essential foundational pieces including the Thick Crust and Mozzarella toppings.

Mike Sparber.bio: Artist and illustrator who crafted the Thin Crust for the Rare Pizzas collection, bringing a wonderfully overcomplicated rendered style to the foundational topping.

Travis O'Dell.bio: Digital artist known as LoudColorz, contributing the super-rare White Bread Crust to the Rare Pizzas collection.

Danny Olefsky.bio: Creative known as Zedarius who designed the iconic Pepperoni topping with its many variants, one of the most recognizable pieces in the Rare Pizzas collection.

Kilroy (Clubhouse).bio: Web3 community member known as 0xKilroy who contributed the super-rare Hazelnut Spread to the Rare Pizzas Sauce collection.

Art Fool.bio: Digital artist creating under the handle the_artfool, known for the epic Prismatic Fluid sauce with its mesmerizing swirling patterns.

John Cabrera.bio: Actor, writer, and fictional world-builder best known for playing Brian Fuller in Gilmore Girls. Contributed the Vegan Cheese topping to the Rare Pizzas collection.

Alexander Mazzei.bio: Documentarian, filmmaker, and photographer who founded NFTs.tips, one of the fastest-growing NFT communities. Co-founder of SelfLabs.xyz, bridging personal development and web3.
